Thông tin: In 1968, the school was renamed Don Bosco First Technical High School. On January 31, 1970, the school was converted into a private Don Bosco Secondary Technical High School, referred to as Don Bosco Technical High School for short. After the day of peace and unification of the country, the Southern Liberation Army took over and on December 19, 1975, the School was handed over to the General Department of Metallurgy and Electronics.
